name: clips-workspace
title: Clips Workspace
description: Clips Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
    "title": "Clips",
    "summary": "Clips Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.",

      "layout": "agent-native-template-workspace",

          "label": "Archive",
          "route": "/clips/archive"

        {
          "label": "Dictate",
          "route": "/clips/dictate"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail Detail",
          "route": "/clips/extensions/:id/:slug"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail",
          "route": "/clips/extensions/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Index",
          "route": "/clips/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions",
          "route": "/clips/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Insights Index",
          "route": "/clips/insights"
        },
        {
          "label": "Library Index",
          "route": "/clips/library"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [

        "path": "/clips/archive",
        "page": "page.clips.archive",
        "title": "Archive",
        "blocks": [
          "block.clips.archive"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/clips/app/routes/_app.archive.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/clips/dictate",
        "page": "page.clips.dictate",
        "title": "Dictate",
        "blocks": [
          "block.clips.dictate"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/clips/app/routes/_app.dictate.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/clips/extensions/:id/:slug",
        "page": "page.clips.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.clips.extensions-detail-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/clips/app/routes/_app.extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/clips/extensions/:id",
        "page": "page.clips.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.clips.extensions-detail"

compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
